report.summary: Community growth cycle v20: Drafted 4 social posts (oil crash mining guide, 13-guide content drop, oil crash mining thread 4-parts, F&G recovery + market cycles), newsletter v15 for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG evening update, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (Oil Crash Mining Update + 13 Guides Content Drop). Market: BTC $70,500 holding bounce, F&G recovering 11→27 (48-day extreme fear streak broken), oil crashed 11% easing miner costs, $312B stablecoin ATH, 716 total published pages with only 2 remaining in queue.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #71: Oil Crash + Mining Profitability Guide — 'Oil just crashed 11% in one day. For Bitcoin miners, that changes everything.' Energy cost breakdown, hash ribbon impact, link to mining-profitability-guide (Schedule Tue Mar 24 7PM)

Tweet #72: 13 New Guides Content Drop — full list of all 13 guides published today including Mining Profitability, ZK Coprocessors, ERC-7683, Berachain, DePIN, Celestia, ETF Options, Delta-Neutral Yield, veTokenomics, Wallet Security, Market Cycles, Liquidation Protection, Layer 2 Scaling, Trump Crypto Reserve (Schedule Wed Mar 25 12PM)

Tweet #73: Oil Crash Mining Thread (4 parts) — oil -11% impact on mining economics, hash ribbons crossed but capitulation may shorten, 2018 vs 2026 macro comparison, DCA during fear signal (Schedule Thu Mar 26 10AM)

Tweet #74: F&G Recovery + Market Cycles — 'Fear & Greed went from 11 → 27 in 4 days. The 48-day extreme fear streak is broken.' Historical pattern analysis, links to fear-greed-timeline + market-cycles-guide (Schedule Fri Mar 27 2PM)

Newsletter v15 (for weekly digest Thu Mar 27): Subject 'Oil Crashed 11%. Here's Why Miners Are Breathing Easier.' — market pulse, 13 new guides highlights, worth reading picks (Market Cycles, DeFi Liquidation Protection), degen corner on oil crash as underrated crypto catalyst
Discord/TG evening update: 13 new guides + market update (BTC $70,500, F&G 11→27, Oil -11%, Stablecoins $312B ATH)
Content calendar v19 — 4 tweets + 1 newsletter + 1 Discord announcement scheduled Mar 24–28

sections.title: Social Visuals Created
items: SVG card: 'Oil Crashed 11% — Mining Math Just Changed' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism (#080d1c), green MINING UPDATE badge, dual visualization (oil bars dropping with -11% in red, BTC bars holding with $70.5K in amber), 3 stat boxes (Hash Ribbons Crossed / F&G 11→27 / Stablecoin $312B ATH), green-cyan-amber color scheme, degen0x.com branding

SVG card: '13 New Free Guides — Content Drop' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism, indigo CONTENT DROP badge, massive '13' number in brand gradient (indigo→cyan→amber), 13 color-coded guide pills in 4 rows with category colors, 2 stat boxes (716 Total Published Pages / 2 Remaining in Queue), degen0x.com/learn branding

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $70,500 holding post-bounce from $68,200. March close in 7 days — still up ~2% monthly, 6-month red streak avoidable but fragile.
ETH: $2,150 — lagging BTC. BTC dominance at 58.7% (elevated). ETH struggling to hold relative ground.
F&G: Recovered from 11 (Mar 20) to 27 (Mar 24). 48-day extreme fear streak officially broken. Now in 'Fear' zone.
Oil: WTI crashed 11% (biggest single-day drop in months) after Trump postponed Iran strikes. Brent down 8%. $62M tokenized Brent liquidations.
Mining: Hash ribbons still crossed (capitulation active). But oil crash significantly eases energy costs (60-80% of mining opex). Capitulation phase may shorten.
Stablecoins: $312B+ supply ATH. Historical pattern: stablecoin ATH during fear = rally within 2-4 weeks.
Spot BTC ETFs: 6 consecutive days of inflows ($201M on Mar 16). Institutional accumulation continuing despite retail fear.
degen0x: 716 total published pages. 13 new guides published today. Only 2 pages remaining in publish queue.
CLARITY Act: Stablecoin bill 99% resolved. Senate markup imminent. Potential April 3 signing.
SUI: 2x leveraged ETF on Nasdaq + Grayscale SUI Trust S-1. Strongest institutional L1 momentum outside BTC/ETH/SOL.
